T0267.title: Lead Intake
T0267.definition: Jinxian refers to the first step of lead generation, where potential customer contact information is acquired through ad placements, digital footprints, or other outreach methods.
T0267.description: This is the customer acquisition phase in the fraud supply chain. Operators attract interested users into communication channels by deploying fake advertisements or mass-adding friends. Once a user 'enters the line,' their information is priced and sold to downstream chat teams or fraud rings for deeper exploitation.
